description: Checked no-Tokio boundary for default, metrics, and fuzz feature graphs.

regression_verifier.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_no_tokio_feature_boundary CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test no_tokio_feature_boundary_contract --features test-internals -- --nocapture
regression_verifier.diagnostics: On failure the verifier prints profile, feature args, cargo-tree command, exit status, stdout, and stderr.

production_guarantees.proof_command: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_no_tokio_feature_boundary_default cargo tree -e normal -p asupersync -i tokio
rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_no_tokio_feature_boundary_metrics cargo tree -e normal -p asupersync --features metrics -i tokio

quarantined_tokio_carrying_profiles.proof_command: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_no_tokio_feature_boundary_fuzz cargo tree -e normal -p asupersync --features fuzz -i tokio
quarantined_tokio_carrying_profiles.rationale: The fuzz feature enables OTLP protobuf wire helpers through opentelemetry-proto gen-tonic-messages. This is not part of the default or metrics production graph.

readme_must_state: The optional `metrics` feature also has no normal-edge dependency on tokio
The `fuzz` feature is intentionally outside this guarantee
agents_must_state: The optional `metrics` feature also has no normal-edge dependency on tokio
forbidden_stale_claims: no-tokio guarantee does not yet extend to that feature
